# The Advantages of Kling AI

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/quickStart/productIntroduction/capabilitiesStatement`
- Source markdown path: `/src/docs/quickStart/productIntroduction/capabilitiesStatement/en.md`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/en-C_2rXui5.js`

## Content (HTML)

<h1 id="the-advantages-of-kling-ai" tabindex="-1">The Advantages of Kling AI</h1>
<hr>
<h2 id="powerful-image-generation-capabilities" tabindex="-1">Powerful Image Generation Capabilities</h2>
<p>“The Most Proficient Chinese Image Generation Model” : Trained on a large language model (LLM) and billions of Chinese corpora, with comprehensive metrics surpassing open-source models like SDXL/SD3 and closed-source models like Midjourney, achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in Chinese scenarios.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th style="text-align:left;" colspan="4">Ability support</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Text to Image</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>Diverse Styles | Exquisite Image Quality | Full of Creativity</strong> <br>Supports user input text freelyto control the content of image generation.</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">Prompt：A white-haired man floating on the water, minimalist style, large areas of blue, animated art style, bright color palette, trendy, deep white and amber tones, loose brushstrokes, deep white and light sky blue, mysterious, detailed painting, Korean aesthetic.</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<div data-width="224" class="media-wrap image-wrap">
<img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/image-ability-manga-boy.png" alt="示例图片" width="224">
</div>
</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Image to Image</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>Consistent with the Prompts | Reference Image Consistency</strong>
<br>Supports users uploading reference images and specifying the model’s reference strength when generating images.</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<div data-width="135" class="media-wrap image-wrap">
<img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/image-generation-ability-girl.jpeg" alt="示例图片" width="135">
</div>
</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<div data-width="201" class="media-wrap image-wrap">
<img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/image-generation-ability-manga-girl.png" alt="示例图片" width="201">
</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>
<br>
</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th style="text-align:left;" colspan="4">Advantages of Image Generation</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Highlight 1</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>Powerful Semantic Understanding Capability</strong>
<br>Continuous innovation in text representation and refined alignment of image-text data</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">Prompt：A stylish Chinese woman on the streets of Shanghai, sunlight shining on her. She is wearing a black leather jacket, a red long skirt, carrying a black backpack, wearing sunglasses, with red lipstick on, walking confidently and casually</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<div data-width="245" class="media-wrap image-wrap">
<img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/highlight-generation-ability-one.jpeg" alt="示例图片" width="245">
</div>
</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Highlight 2</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>Cinematographic Image Texture Quality</strong>
<br>Multi-stage progressive training, reinforcement learning and refined alignment of human aesthetics</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">Prompt：Cinematic image quality, the azure lake water reflects the pure white feathers of two swans, with continuous and clear snow-capped mountains in the distance, forming reflections on the water surface, creating a symmetrical image. The scene is captured with a camera-like quality, using a large aperture, high contrast, and high saturation</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<div data-width="245" class="media-wrap image-wrap">
<img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/highlight-generation-ability-two.jpeg" alt="示例图片" width="245">
</div>
</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Highlight 3</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>Control Generation Under Multiple Condition</strong>
<br>Conditional combination generation, especially the preservation of portraits and the ability to incorporate text into images</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">Prompt：Oil painting style, the Bund in Shanghai, clear blue sky, Monet’s painting style, dreamy and hazy, Morandi color palette, Impressionist, light and shadow, fresh colors, rich in details, a masterpiece</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<div data-width="245" class="media-wrap image-wrap">
<img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/highlight-generation-ability-three.jpeg" alt="示例图片" width="245">
</div>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="outstanding-video-generation-capabilities" tabindex="-1">Outstanding Video Generation Capabilities</h2>
<p>“The World’s Leading Video Generation Model” : Kling is the first video generation large-scale model that is open to users, currently leading in both domestic and international markets.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th style="text-align:left;" colspan="4">Ability support</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Text to Video</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>Semantic Instruction Understanding｜Motion Logical Consistency</strong>
<br>Generates dynamic video content based on text</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">Prompt：A panda is playing guitar by the lake</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="286" style="height:auto;">
<video data-uid="66288904-1b8a-4e6c-8d43-7afc08c6682a" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/panda.mp4" controls>
</video>
</span>
</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Image to Video</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>Consistency | Large-Scale Motion</strong>
<br>Generates dynamic video content based on images plus text control</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<div data-width="128" class="media-wrap image-wrap">
<img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/tiger.jpeg" alt="示例图片" width="128">
</div>
</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="286" style="height:161px;">
<video data-uid="6a0391b6-da2b-468e-ad69-917c9287ab95" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/tiger.mp4" controls>
</video>
</span>
</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Multi-Image to Video</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>Multi-subject integration | Multi-subject interaction</strong>
<br>Generate dynamic video content based on multiple images</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<div data-width="128" class="media-wrap image-wrap">
<img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/multi-image-a-girl.jpeg" alt="示例图片" width="128">

</div>
<br>&quot;A girl riding a unicorn in the forest, cinematic realism style&quot;</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="286" style="height:161px;">
<video data-uid="a2707404-515c-4bec-b03b-aaa9368a0ccc" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/a-girl-on-unicorn.mp4" controls>

</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<strong>Start and End Frames｜Camera Movement｜…</strong>

<td style="text-align:left;">

</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="286" style="height:auto;">
<video data-uid="a7a37615-384b-4f6e-8c29-39501c56996b" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/front-and-back-frame-control.mp4" controls>

<br>
</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th style="text-align:left;" colspan="4">Advantages of Video Generation</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Highlight 1</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>Generation of Significant and Realistic Motion</strong>
<br>Kling employs a 3D spatio-temporal joint attention mechanism, which enables it to better model complex spatio-temporal movements in videos. As a result, Kling can not only generate significant motion but also adhere more closely to the natural laws of motion.</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="226" style="height:auto;">
<video data-uid="224b0657-bd60-4df4-a3de-9087bb95d607" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/astronaut.mp4" controls>
</video>
</span>
</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="226" style="height:auto;">
<video data-uid="4faa3e86-9da5-4ec6-8bb7-b4133b193c6c" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/man-riding-horse.mp4" controls>
</video>
</span>
</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Highlight 2</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>Minute-Long Video Generation</strong>
<br>Benefiting from efficient training infrastructure, extreme inference optimization, and scalable foundational architecture, Kling can generate videos up to 3 minutes long.</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="226" style="height:127px;">
<video data-uid="3f90b8fb-e0aa-4a49-be3b-3de3d1dd3df5" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/long-2.mp4" controls>
</video>
</span>
</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="226" style="height:auto;">
<video data-uid="8a08f294-e4f3-4c7b-bc5d-31bf2792ac13" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/long-1.mp4" controls>
</video>
</span>
</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Highlight 3</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>More Accurate Simulation of Physical World Characteristics</strong>
<br>Kling’s large model utilizes a 3D spatiotemporal joint attention mechanism, which enhances its ability to model the intricate spatiotemporal dynamics present in videos.Therefore, Keling’s large model is capable of generating movements with a significant range and is more aligned with the laws of motion.</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="226" style="height:auto;">
<video data-uid="30436386-9d96-4bbd-877d-27a91f4b313c" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/astronaut.mp4" controls>
</video>
</span>
</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="226" style="height:auto;">
<video data-uid="265a7d4f-e7b9-45db-8f06-6b01c0f8f278" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/man-riding-horse.mp4" controls>
</video>
</span>
</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="text-align:left;">Highlight 4</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<strong>Strong Conceptual Combination Ability and Imagination</strong>
<br>Leveraging the model’s deep understanding of text-video semantics and the robust conceptual combination capabilities learned from the Diffusion Transformer architecture, Keling’s large model can transform users’ rich imagination into concrete imagery.</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="226" style="height:auto;">
<video data-uid="638a6841-b699-45f7-9958-09491552159d" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/cat.mp4" controls>
</video>
</span>
</td>
<td style="text-align:left;">
<span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="226" style="height:auto;">
<video data-uid="613c1ee0-c320-4807-806f-6969607b248f" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/eruption.mp4" controls>
</video>
</span>
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h2 id="vivid-and-natural-lip-sync-capability" tabindex="-1">Vivid and Natural Lip-Sync Capability</h2>
<p>The lip-sync feature can perfectly synchronize the lip movements of characters in videos generated by Kling AI with locally recorded or online-generated dubbing/singing files, achieving the effect of real people speaking or singing, and making the video appear lifelike!</p>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="cs-1">
<ul>
<li>
<strong>Naturally and Highly Matched Lip Movements:</strong> The lip movements of characters in the generated video not only synchronize precisely with the audio but also create unique movement trajectories based on individual facial features and physiological structures, significantly enhancing the video’s naturalness and realism.</li>
<li>
<strong>Clear Facial Muscle Texture:</strong> The changes in lip movements accurately drive the facial muscles, adjusting in real-time and meticulously presenting the stretching and contraction of muscles during lip movement, resulting in a highly coordinated visual effect that further enhances the overall realism and immersive quality of the video.</li>
<li>
<strong>Vivid and Lifelike Imagery:</strong> The areas outside the face in the generated video remain consistent with the original video, ensuring the integrity and continuity of the original footage, avoiding interference with non-target areas during the generation process, and restoring the original appearance of the video to the greatest extent possible.</li>
</ul>
</div>

## Plain Text Snapshot

The Advantages of Kling AI Powerful Image Generation Capabilities “The Most Proficient Chinese Image Generation Model” : Trained on a large language model (LLM) and billions of Chinese corpora, with comprehensive metrics surpassing open-source models like SDXL/SD3 and closed-source models like Midjourney, achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in Chinese scenarios. Ability support Text to Image Diverse Styles | Exquisite Image Quality | Full of Creativity Supports user input text freelyto control the content of image generation. Prompt：A white-haired man floating on the water, minimalist style, large areas of blue, animated art style, bright color palette, trendy, deep white and amber tones, loose brushstrokes, deep white and light sky blue, mysterious, detailed painting, Korean aesthetic. Image to Image Consistent with the Prompts | Reference Image Consistency Supports users uploading reference images and specifying the model’s reference strength when generating images. Advantages of Image Generation Highlight 1 Powerful Semantic Understanding Capability Continuous innovation in text representation and refined alignment of image-text data Prompt：A stylish Chinese woman on the streets of Shanghai, sunlight shining on her. She is wearing a black leather jacket, a red long skirt, carrying a black backpack, wearing sunglasses, with red lipstick on, walking confidently and casually Highlight 2 Cinematographic Image Texture Quality Multi-stage progressive training, reinforcement learning and refined alignment of human aesthetics Prompt：Cinematic image quality, the azure lake water reflects the pure white feathers of two swans, with continuous and clear snow-capped mountains in the distance, forming reflections on the water surface, creating a symmetrical image. The scene is captured with a camera-like quality, using a large aperture, high contrast, and high saturation Highlight 3 Control Generation Under Multiple Condition Conditional combination generation, especially the preservation of portraits and the ability to incorporate text into images Prompt：Oil painting style, the Bund in Shanghai, clear blue sky, Monet’s painting style, dreamy and hazy, Morandi color palette, Impressionist, light and shadow, fresh colors, rich in details, a masterpiece Outstanding Video Generation Capabilities “The World’s Leading Video Generation Model” : Kling is the first video generation large-scale model that is open to users, currently leading in both domestic and international markets. Ability support Text to Video Semantic Instruction Understanding｜Motion Logical Consistency Generates dynamic video content based on text Prompt：A panda is playing guitar by the lake Image to Video Consistency | Large-Scale Motion Generates dynamic video content based on images plus text control Multi-Image to Video Multi-subject integration | Multi-subject interaction Generate dynamic video content based on multiple images "A girl riding a unicorn in the forest, cinematic realism style" Video Editor Start and End Frames｜Camera Movement｜… A tool for the entire process of film and video creation Advantages of Video Generation Highlight 1 Generation of Significant and Realistic Motion Kling employs a 3D spatio-temporal joint attention mechanism, which enables it to better model complex spatio-temporal movements in videos. As a result, Kling can not only generate significant motion but also adhere more closely to the natural laws of motion. Highlight 2 Minute-Long Video Generation Benefiting from efficient training infrastructure, extreme inference optimization, and scalable foundational architecture, Kling can generate videos up to 3 minutes long. Highlight 3 More Accurate Simulation of Physical World Characteristics Kling’s large model utilizes a 3D spatiotemporal joint attention mechanism, which enhances its ability to model the intricate spatiotemporal dynamics present in videos.Therefore, Keling’s large model is capable of generating movements with a significant range and is more aligned with the laws of motion. Highlight 4 Strong Conceptual Combination Ability and Imagination Leveraging the model’s deep understanding of text-video semantics and the robust conceptual combination capabilities learned from the Diffusion Transformer architecture, Keling’s large model can transform users’ rich imagination into concrete imagery. Vivid and Natural Lip-Sync Capability The lip-sync feature can perfectly synchronize the lip movements of characters in videos generated by Kling AI with locally recorded or online-generated dubbing/singing files, achieving the effect of real people speaking or singing, and making the video appear lifelike! Naturally and Highly Matched Lip Movements: The lip movements of characters in the generated video not only synchronize precisely with the audio but also create unique movement trajectories based on individual facial features and physiological structures, significantly enhancing the video’s naturalness and realism. Clear Facial Muscle Texture: The changes in lip movements accurately drive the facial muscles, adjusting in real-time and meticulously presenting the stretching and contraction of muscles during lip movement, resulting in a highly coordinated visual effect that further enhances the overall realism and immersive quality of the video. Vivid and Lifelike Imagery: The areas outside the face in the generated video remain consistent with the original video, ensuring the integrity and continuity of the original footage, avoiding interference with non-target areas during the generation process, and restoring the original appearance of the video to the greatest extent possible.

The Single Image Effects allows users to upload an image containing human subjects or objects to instantly generate two types of effect videos: “squish” and “expansion” . The Dual-character Effects enables users to upload two portrait photos to automatically create three types of affectionate interaction videos: “Hug”, “Kiss”, and “Heart_gesture”, delivering realistic, natural, and entertaining visual experiences.</p><div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="cs-1"><ul><li><strong>High Scalability:</strong> Offers more flexible calling parameters, enabling scalable video effects customization.</li><li><strong>End-to-End Generation：</strong> Encapsulates pre- and post-processing capabilities required for video effects, allowing one-click generation of target effects for a more convenient and efficient experience.</li><li><strong>Dual-Character Effects：</strong> Kling AI adaptively stitches two user-uploaded portrait images into a single composite photo, which is then used for video generation.</li></ul></div>

data-width="257" style="height:auto;"><video data-uid="73c533f8-f0d7-4a6f-acd8-ffb3bc545206" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/video-effects6.mp4" controls></video></span></td></tr></tbody></table><h2 id="advanced-virtual-try-on-capability" tabindex="-1">Advanced Virtual Try-On Capability</h2><p>Virtual Try-on is powered by our image-generation model, integrating technologies that preserve clothing SKUs, adjust human poses, and restore backgrounds. It enables users to generate try-on effects for any clothing, body shape, and pose. Even with complex backgrounds, high-quality try-on results can be achieved.</p><div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="cs-2"><ul><li><strong>Preserving Clothing Styles&amp; Details:</strong> With Kolors Virtual Try-on, users can “try on” a wide range of clothing, from tops to dresses. The model can retain details like patterns, texts, and designs, ensuring the virtual try-on experience matches the real one.</li><li><strong>Natural Try-on Effects:</strong> Kolors Virtual Try-on can create realistic and natural fitting effects. Users can “dress” 2D clothing in any setting, whether indoors or outdoors, with results that adhere to the laws of physics, making it look seamless and lifelike.</li><li><strong>Full Process Generation:</strong> Powered by Kolors’ image-generation large model, the system can generate models of different ages, genders, and ethnicities, while adapting to various backgrounds, catering to global e-commerce needs. Additionally, leveraging Kling’s powerful image-to-video model, it can transform model photos into short videos, enabling full-process generation from image to video.</li></ul></div>
<p><br></p><table><thead><tr><th style="text-align:left;" colspan="3">Try-on Showcases</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td style="text-align:left;"><div data-width="257" class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/outfit-1.png" alt="示例图片" width="257"></div></td><td style="text-align:left;"><div data-width="257" class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/outfit-2.png" alt="示例图片" width="257"></div></td><td style="text-align:left;"><div data-width="257" class="media-wrap image-wrap"><img src="https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/outfit-3.png" alt="示例图片" width="257"></div></td></tr></tbody></table><p><br></p><table><thead><tr><th style="text-align:left;" colspan="3">Scenario</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td style="text-align:left;">For Customers</td><td style="text-align:left;">E-commerce Content Generation</td><td style="text-align:left;">Costume Change Effects</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left;"><span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="257" style="height:auto;"><video data-uid="a5f02bf0-7c5f-425b-95a8-a7ab9ccb3628" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/real-person-try-on.mp4" controls></video></span></td><td style="text-align:left;"><span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="257" style="height:auto;"><video data-uid="56720528-59e4-4f6c-bd12-275a1da5012f" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/aI-model-trying-on.mp4" controls></video></span></td><td style="text-align:left;"><span class="media-wrap video-wrap" data-width="257" style="height:173px;"><video data-uid="d54c3782-e660-4b71-9396-403fa745f107" src="https://v1-kling.kechuangai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/videos/wukong-dress-up.mp4" controls></video></span></td></tr></tbody></table>

tabindex="-1">Vivid and Natural Lip-Sync Capability</h2><p>The lip-sync feature can perfectly synchronize the lip movements of characters in videos generated by Kling AI with locally recorded or online-generated dubbing/singing files, achieving the effect of real people speaking or singing, and making the video appear lifelike!</p><div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="cs-1"><ul><li><strong>Naturally and Highly Matched Lip Movements:</strong> The lip movements of characters in the generated video not only synchronize precisely with the audio but also create unique movement trajectories based on individual facial features and physiological structures, significantly enhancing the video’s naturalness and realism.</li><li><strong>Clear Facial Muscle Texture:</strong> The changes in lip movements accurately drive the facial muscles, adjusting in real-time and meticulously presenting the stretching and contraction of muscles during lip movement, resulting in a highly coordinated visual effect that further enhances the overall realism and immersive quality of the video.</li><li><strong>Vivid and Lifelike Imagery:</strong> The areas outside the face in the generated video remain consistent with the original video, ensuring the integrity and continuity of the original footage, avoiding interference with non-target areas during the generation process, and restoring the original appearance of the video to the greatest extent possible.</li></ul></div>',15)),n("table",null,[c[1]||(c[1]=n("thead",null,[n("tr",null,[n("th",{colspan:"2"},"Advantages of Dual-character Effects capabilities. The Single Image Effects allows users to upload an image containing human subjects or objects to instantly generate two types of effect videos: “squish” and “expansion” . The Dual-character Effects enables users to upload two portrait photos to automatically create three types of affectionate interaction videos: “Hug”, “Kiss”, and “Heart_gesture”, delivering realistic, natural, and entertaining visual experiences.</p><div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="cs-1"><ul><li><strong>High Scalability:</strong> Offers more flexible calling parameters, enabling scalable video effects customization.</li><li><strong>End-to-End Generation：</strong> Encapsulates pre- and post-processing capabilities required for video effects, allowing one-click generation of target effects for a more convenient and efficient experience.</li><li><strong>Dual-Character Effects：</strong> Kling AI adaptively stitches two user-uploaded portrait images into a single composite photo, which is then used for video generation.</li></ul></div>',5)),n("table",null,[c[2]||(c[2]=n("thead",null,[n("tr",null,[n("th",{colspan:"2"},"Advantages of Video
